name: nt
description: A growing toolkit of design skills for Claude Code: conceptual, target-oriented design (the system you intend to build), not as-is documentation.

plugins.name: nt
plugins.description: Design skills toolkit. First skill: designing-by-altitude — formalize and maintain a system's conceptual design (a North Star for the whole system, subsystem designs for each block) as living design-as-context.
